RESOURCES
Managing
Relationships
Theory and
Tactics
The fifth of The 5 Core Habits - Managing Relationships.
Managing the different kinds of relationships in your life.
Managing Relationships Tactics & Theory
- Normal people will not like you
- Understand that your goals aren’t normal, so your life
won’t be in the eyes of most.
- Business partnership dynamics
- Marriage dynamic
- Fullback v Cheerleader
Managing Relationships Tactics
- Audit your group
- Be comfortable with a smaller group
- Avoid complainers
- Discuss marriage & goals
- Discuss partnership roles & clear swim lanes
- Wishlist for both relationships
